name: Kleefstra syndrome 1
definition: Intellectual disability syndrome caused by EHMT1 haploinsufficiency. Features: severe intellectual disability, childhood hypotonia, distinctive facial features including synophrys, midface hypoplasia, prognathism, and broad forehead. Behavioral problems including autism spectrum disorder. Seizures in subset.

name: Keratitis-ichthyosis-deafness syndrome
definition: Rare ectodermal dysplasia caused by GJB2 mutations. Features: corneal vascularization, ichthyotic skin plaques, sensorineural hearing loss. High risk of squamous cell carcinoma.

name: Arthrochalasia Ehlers-Danlos syndrome
definition: Connective tissue disorder caused by COL1A1/COL1A2 mutations. Features: severe generalized joint hypermobility with recurrent dislocations, congenital hip dislocation, skin hyperextensibility, and osteopenia.

name: Cowden syndrome
definition: Rare autosomal dominant disorder caused by PTEN mutations. Features: multiple hamartomas, macrocephaly, thyroid abnormalities, high risk of breast, thyroid and endometrial cancer. Mucocutaneous lesions are hallmark.

name: Athyreosis
synonyms: Congenital hypothyroidism due to thyroid dysgenesis
definition: Congenital absence of thyroid gland, most common cause of congenital hypothyroidism. Caused by TSHR, PAX8, NKX2-1 mutations. Features: neonatal hypothyroidism, jaundice, feeding difficulties, developmental delay if untreated.

name: Holoprosencephaly 5
definition: Brain malformation caused by ZIC2 mutations. Features: alobar or semilobar holoprosencephaly, intellectual disability, spasticity, seizures. Facial features vary by subtype.

name: Noonan syndrome-like disorder with or without juvenile myelomonocytic leukemia
definition: RASopathy caused by CBL mutations. Features: Noonan-like facies, short stature, cardiac defects, predisposition to JMML. Cafe-au-lait macules, intellectual disability in subset.

name: Neurodevelopmental disorder with speech impairment and with or without seizures
definition: Neurodevelopmental disorder caused by CACNA1I mutations. Features: global developmental delay, speech and language delay, intellectual disability, seizures in subset, behavioral abnormalities.

name: Menkes disease
definition: X-linked recessive copper metabolism disorder caused by ATP7A mutations. Features: progressive neurodegeneration, kinky sparse hair, connective tissue abnormalities, hypotonia, seizures, intracranial hemorrhage, failure to thrive.

name: Intellectual disability, autosomal dominant 1
definition: Autosomal dominant intellectual disability with absent or delayed speech, behavioral problems, mild dysmorphic features including hypertelorism, broad forehead, depressed nasal bridge, macroglossia, high palate.

name: Noonan syndrome
definition: Common RASopathy with autosomal dominant inheritance. Features: short stature, congenital heart defects, characteristic facial features (hypertelorism, ptosis, low-set ears), broad or webbed neck, chest deformity, developmental delay.

name: Menkes disease
definition: X-linked copper transport disorder. Neonatal jaundice, intracranial hemorrhage, hypotonia, seizures, progressive encephalopathy, connective tissue laxity, umbilical hernia, distinctive facies.
